subcodes.first_line: O Lord, unto Thee be praise for the dawning of the Sun of Forgiveness from the dayspring of Thine Oneness upon the people of transgression, and unto Thee be thanks [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب لک الحمد علی ما اشرق شمس الغفران من مطلع احدیتک علی اهل العصیان و لک الشکر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
